title: Algerian Date Tagine
description: A traditional Algerian dessert made with dates, sugar, and a hint of spices. This tagine is perfect for warm evenings.
instructions: Rinse the dates and remove any pits. Cut them into small pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together the dates, sugar, and jelly.
Add the night and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 20cm (8 inch) round baking dish.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes.
